fields.Plan Name: Anthem Clear Choice Silver PPO 75/0%/9100 Rx Copay
fields.In-Network Newborn Delivery: $500/pregnancy for office visits and childbirth/delivery professional services, $3,000/day to a maximum of $9,000/admission for childbirth/delivery facility services
fields.Out-of-Network Newborn Delivery: 50% coinsurance for office visits and childbirth/delivery professional services, 50% coinsurance for childbirth/delivery facility services
fields.Out-of-Network Major Diagnostics: 50% coinsurance for diagnostic tests and imaging
fields.Deductible Explanation: Generally, you must pay all of the costs from providers up to the deductible amount before this plan begins to pay.
fields.In-Network RX: Typically Generic (Tier 1): $10/prescription (retail) / Typically Preferred Brand & Non-Preferred Generic Drugs (Tier 2): $60/prescription (retail) / Typically Non-Preferred Brand and Generic drugs (Tier 3): $125/prescription (retail) / Typically Preferred Specialty (brand and generic) (Tier 4): $500/prescription (retail)
fields.Out-of-Network RX: Typically Generic (Tier 1): 50% coinsurance, deductible does not apply (retail) / Typically Preferred Brand & Non-Preferred Generic Drugs (Tier 2): 50% coinsurance, deductible does not apply (retail) / Typically Non-Preferred Brand and Generic drugs (Tier 3): 50% coinsurance, deductible does not apply (retail) / Typically Preferred Specialty (brand and generic) (Tier 4): 50% coinsurance, deductible does not apply (retail)
